creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text: GNOME Builder doesn't really depend on a specific LLVM version, and the reason that both GNOME Builder and Meson have a hard-coded list of LLVM versions are that FreeBSD doesn't have an unversioned 'llvm-config' executable. I have sent patches to GNOME Builder upstream several times to expand the list, and all are done without any code changes.
